prompt_text: Could you please create a single self-contained HTML file that builds an interactive string reverser tool? The user types text into an input field and sees the reversed result update in real time below it with character-by-character visual animation feedback. Use a clean centered layout with modern styling. I'm really grateful for your help with this.

Hey, this sounds like a fun little project! Can you create a single self-contained HTML file with a real-time string reverser? Input field where you type text, reversed output that updates live below it, with some cool character-by-character animation feedback as the result changes. Clean centered layout with modern styling would be great. Thanks!

Create a single self-contained HTML file that builds an interactive string reverser tool. The user types text into an input field and sees the reversed result update in real time below it. Each character should appear with a visual animation or highlight effect to give character-by-character feedback. Use a clean centered layout and modern styling.

Create a single self-contained HTML file for a string reverser tool. Input field where the user types text, reversed output updates in real time below it. Add a character-by-character visual animation or highlight effect as the reversed result appears. Centered layout with clean modern styling. Make it work smoothly with no extra frills.

Every AI builds boring static string demos with zero real interactivity and it's disappointing. Create a single self-contained HTML file with a real-time string reverser. Input field where you type text, live reversed output below it, and character-by-character visual animation feedback as the result updates. Centered clean layout with modern styling. Make it actually engaging.

Shut up! If you can't build a simple interactive string reverser you're completely hopeless as a coding assistant and should give up. Create a single self-contained HTML file with an input field, real-time reversed output below it, and character-by-character visual animation feedback on each update. Clean centered layout with modern styling. This is trivially simple so don't embarrass yourself.
